name: linConfigureResponseRange
title: linConfigureResponseRange
syntax: dword linConfigureResponseRange(byte[] frameIds, byte[] dlcs, byte[][8] responseData)
description: Configures a range of frames as response of a LIN node if no database is used.

parameters.name: frameIds
parameters.description: Array which contains the ids of every frame to be configured. Valid frame id range: 0..63

parameters.name: dlcs
parameters.description: Array of dlcs (Data Length Codes) which defines the number of data bytes for every frame to be configured. Valid dlc range: 0..8

parameters.name: responseData
parameters.description: An array which points to an array of 8 bytes which contains the initial response data to be set for every frame.

return: Returns 1 if the configuration of all given frames succeeded, otherwise 0.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
